name: Dun

skills.name: Unyielding Might
skills.description: Periodic Passive effect: When Health drops beyond a certain threshold, taking damage will enhance him. While enhanced, he recovers Health when hitting enemies with skills and Basic Attacks.

skills.name: Wind Slash
skills.description:
Slashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range and slowing them.
If the skill lands a hit, it can be used again before going into cooldown, dealing damage to enemies in range and launching them.

skills.name: Gale's Benediction
skills.description:
Deals damage to enemies in range and grants a shield.
Enhances the next 3 Basic Attacks to deal extra true damage.
Every enhanced Basic Attack hit reduces his Ultimate's cooldown.

skills.name: Unruly Blade
skills.description:
Throws his chain blade to the target location, stunning and dealing damage to enemies hit.
When max range is reached or an enemy is hit, the chain blade will pull him to its location, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

skillsZh.name: 噬目
skillsZh.description: 每隔一段時間獲得被動效果：當自身血量低於一定程度時，受到傷害後可強化自身。強化期間每次普攻和技能命中敵人回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 豪氣斬
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向斬擊，對範圍內敵人造成傷害和減速效果。
若命中任一敵人，就可在技能冷卻前朝指定方向再次施放技能，對範圍內敵人造成傷害和擊飛效果。

skillsZh.name: 龍捲閃
skillsZh.description:
對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害，同時為自身增加護盾值。
強化下三次普攻，造成額外真實傷害。
每次強化普攻減少【不羈之刃】冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 不羈之刃
skillsZh.description:
向指定位置投擲鏈刃，對命中敵人造成傷害和暈眩效果。
達到最遠距離或命中敵人後，將自己拉至鏈刃位置，對附近敵人造成傷害。

tips: Build: Blazing Cape, Succubus Cloak, Ominous Premonition.
tipsZh: 夏侯惇（對抗路）：梯度 S，勝率 53.72%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：紅蓮斗篷、魔女斗篷、不祥徵兆.

patchHistory.change: Adjusted the damage enhanced Basic Attacks deal to heroes and non-hero units

patchHistory.detail: As a versatile fighter, Dun has excellent survivability. We have adjusted his skill bonuses to make him perform more consistently when using different equipment.

patchHistory.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
patchHistory.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整強化普攻對英雄和非英雄的傷害
平衡不同套裝的效果收益
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「身為一位全能的戰士，夏侯惇的生存能力有目共睹，本次我們調整了他的技能加成結構，希望他在不同出裝下都能夠有不錯的表現。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

faqs.question: Is Dun good in current season?
faqs.answer: Dun is Tier S Tank with 53.72% win rate, 1.7% pick rate, and 0.51% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Dun build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Blazing Cape, Succubus Cloak, Ominous Premonition, Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Dun?
faqs.answer: Pick Han Xin, Li Bai, Wukong. Strong into Diaochan, Fang, Erin.

faqsZh.question: 夏侯惇 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 夏侯惇 為 S 梯度，勝率 53.72%、選取 1.7%、禁用 0.51%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 夏侯惇 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：紅蓮斗篷、魔女斗篷、不祥徵兆、極寒風暴、永夜守護、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 夏侯惇？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Han Xin、Li Bai、Wukong。夏侯惇 克制 Diaochan、Fang、Erin。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Fang, Erin. Weak into: Han Xin, Li Bai, Wukong.

guide.overview: Dun is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 52.3% win rate and 1.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dun: Periodic Passive Effect: When Health drops too low, taking damage will enhance Dun.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Frostscar's Embrace, Blazing Cape, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail, Blood Rage. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Dun's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wind Slash → Gale's Benediction → Unruly Blade → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Unruly Blade (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Wind Slash, and Unruly Blade on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Wind Slash → Gale's Benediction → Unruly Blade → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Dun is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Dun. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Dun vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Dun has +0.9% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Dun when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Dun vs Arthur (Tank, Tier S): Arthur is 1.5% pick / 50.5% WR. Dun has +1.7% WR vs Arthur in Camp data. Choose Dun when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Arthur for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Dun excels into Diaochan, Fang, Erin. Avoid blind picking into Han Xin, Li Bai, Wukong without team peel.
